description_long: This is a modern bungalow set on a rectangular plot with a well-maintained lawn and a paved driveway leading to a garage. The building features a flat roof with a central raised section, large windows, and a mix of brick and concrete exterior walls. The backyard includes a swimming pool, a patio area, and is surrounded by mature trees and shrubbery, providing privacy and shade. There is a small garden with flower beds at the front, and a wooden deck or gazebo is visible among the trees in the rear corner. The property is bordered by dense greenery, creating a secluded atmosphere. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor spaces and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a garage, a swimming pool, and lush landscaping, set on a private, tree-lined lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance, and landscaped front garden.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, side windows, and the backyard with pool and patio.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, patio, dense trees, and a wooden deck or gazebo.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side wall, greenery, and partial view of the backyard features.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on multiple facades
